zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne DE TOULOUSE-ROCHEFORT於大約1198年出生在法國藍多-盧希隆加爾波奧卡爾時，她的父親Raymond VI de Toulouse43歲，母親Joan of England Queen of Sicily34歲。她和Bernard III de LA TOUR-d'AUVERGNE至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1255年5月28日享年58歲，埋葬在瑞士瓦特拉 圖-德-爾茲瓦辛。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne DE TOULOUSE-ROCHEFORT was born about 1198, in Beaucaire, Gard, Languedoc-Roussillon, France, her father, Raymond VI de Toulouse, was 43 and her mother, Joan of England Queen of Sicily, was 34. She had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Bernard III de LA TOUR-d'AUVERGNE. She died on 28 May 1255, at the age of 58, and was buried in Vassin, La Tour-de-Peilz, Vaud, Switzerland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne DE TOULOUSE-ROCHEFORT est née environ 1198, à Beaucaire, Gard, Languedoc-Roussillon, France, son père, Raymond VI de Toulouse, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Joan of England Queen of Sicily, avait 34 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Bernard III de LA TOUR-d'AUVERGNE. Elle est décédée le 28 mai 1255, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Vassin, La Tour-de-Peilz, Vaud, Suisse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne DE TOULOUSE-ROCHEFORT um 1198 in Beaucaire, Gard, Languedoc-Roussillon, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Raymond VI de Toulouse 43 und ihre Mutter Joan of England Queen of Sicily 34. Sie hatte mit Bernard III de LA TOUR-d'AUVERGNE mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 28. Mai 1255 im Alter von 58 Jahren und wurde in Vassin, La Tour-de-Peilz, Waadt, Schweiz begraben.

Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Bernard III de LA TOUR-d'AUVERGNE. Morì il 28 maggio 1255, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolta a Vassin, La Tour-de-Peilz, Vaud, Svizzera.

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne DE TOULOUSE-ROCHEFORT(이)가 대략 1198년 프랑스 랭도c-루시런 가드 보카어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Raymond VI de Toulouse(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan of England Queen of Sicily(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 Bernard III de LA TOUR-d'AUVERGNE(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1255년 5월 28일 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 스위스 바드 라 토우-데-p이즈 바신에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne DE TOULOUSE-ROCHEFORT nasceu aproximadamente 1198, em Beaucaire, Gard, Languedoc-Roussillon, França, seu pai, Raymond VI de Toulouse, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Joan of England Queen of Sicily, tinha 34 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Bernard III de LA TOUR-d'AUVERGNE. Ela faleceu em 28 de maio de 1255, com 58 anos, e foi sepultada em Vassin, La Tour-de-Peilz, Vaud, Suiça.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne DE TOULOUSE-ROCHEFORT родилась около 1198 г. в местности бокеир, гард, лангуедок-руссиллон, Франция, её отцу по имени Raymond VI de Toulouse было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Joan of England Queen of Sicily, 34. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Bernard III de LA TOUR-d'AUVERGNE. Она умерла 28 мая 1255 г. в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности вассин, ла тоур-де-пилз, вауд, Швейцария.
